media-errors.not-found: We couldn't find a camera on your device. Please use another device.
media-errors.already-in-use: Another application is using your camera, please close the other application and try again.
media-errors.constraint: We couldn't find a camera that could be used to take photos. Please use another device.
media-errors.other-error: There was an error accessing your camera. Please try again.

missing-permissions.title: Allow access to your {{permissionName}}
missing-permissions.subtitle: This lets you submit photos of your documents, and we can use them to verify your identity.
missing-permissions.cta: Open settings to give camera permissions

id-doc-photo-prompt.title: Submit your {{type}} ({{side}})
id-doc-photo-prompt.subtitle: Upload or take a photo of the {{side}} of your {{type}}.

check-lighting.title: Check your lighting
check-lighting.description: It can't be too bright or too dark.

device-steady.title: Hold your device steady
device-steady.description: Make sure you're holding your device steady to get a clear photo without any blur or glare.

whole-document.title: Get the whole document in the photo
whole-document.description: We recommend that you place your document on a flat surface.

selfie-consent.title: Allow Footprint to collect and use your biometric data
selfie-consent.subtitle: Footprint will collect, use, and share this data with third party providers to confirm your identity and improve its systems and security.
selfie-consent.footer: By continuing you are agree to Footprint and third-party vendors' privacy policies.

country-and-type-selection.title: Scan or upload your ID
country-and-type-selection.subtitle: We need some more information about your identity.

selfie-photo-prompt.title: Take a selfie
selfie-photo-prompt.subtitle: This will allow us to validate the ID document you uploaded in the previous step.

check-lighting.title: Check your lighting
check-lighting.description: It can't be too bright or too dark.

device-steady.title: Hold your device steady
device-steady.description: Make sure you're holding your device steady to get a clear photo without any blur or glare.

whole-face.title: Make sure your face is clearly visible and centered
whole-face.description: You should face the camera directly and capture your whole head.

camera.instructions: Center your face in the area

processing-documents.title: Processing your documents
processing-documents.subtitle: This should only take a few seconds.

failure.title: Document couldn't be verified
failure.subtitle: We'll review your identity and reach out to you shortly.
